scripts.auth: cd auth     && npm run build && npm run preview
scripts.products: cd products && npm run build && npm run preview
scripts.cart: cd cart     && npm run build && npm run preview
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n "AUTH,PRODUCTS,CART,SHELL" -c "cyan,magenta,yellow,green" "npm run auth" "npm run products" "npm run cart" "npm run shell:wait"
